body.title: DatacenterClient — check_for_invalidate() + re-announce on match
body.result: DatacenterClient.check_for_invalidate ships + architectural fix: separate comms://invalidate mailbox so manifests and invalidates don't race in announce()'s poll loop. Coalesces N matched invalidates into 1 re-announce. Re-announce timeout preserves stale manifest. 6 new client tests + Invalidator/Skeleton updated for new mailbox. 205 passed. agent_datacenter commit 9e50bd5.
body.description:
Closes the cache invalidation loop. The Invalidator (slice 3b) publishes kind=invalidate envelopes to comms://announce-events when a profile or registry changes. This ticket extends DatacenterClient with the consumer side: check_for_invalidate() polls announce-events for kind=invalidate envelopes whose target matches the client's agent_id (or 'registry' which all clients heed), and triggers re-announce + cache replace. Manual-pump pattern matches the rest of slice 1-3 — slice 3b-2 will add a background thread for push-driven cache freshness.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/client.py (extend with check_for_invalidate + private re-announce helper), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/test_datacenter_client.py (extend with invalidate tests)
**Design rules:** check_for_invalidate is a single non-blocking call (returns count of invalidates handled); re-announce on a match replaces the cached manifest atomically; envelopes whose target doesn't match (other agent's invalidate) are dropped silently; checks happen against announce-events with the client's primary_mailbox filter same as initial announce so multi-agent sharing the mailbox works.
**Scope boundary:** in — check_for_invalidate() method, re-announce on match, manifest cache atomic replace; tests covering match-on-agent-id / match-on-registry / no-match-no-action / re-announce-failure-leaves-stale-manifest. Out — background thread polling (slice 3b-2), inotify-driven push, manifest TTL/expiry, structured callback notifications.
**Test plan:** test_check_for_invalidate_returns_zero_when_no_envelopes; test_invalidate_for_our_agent_triggers_reannounce (post invalidate, run pump separately, verify manifest re-fetched); test_invalidate_for_registry_triggers_reannounce; test_invalidate_for_other_agent_ignored (target=cc when client is igor → no re-announce); test_check_for_invalidate_handles_re-announce_timeout_gracefully (returns 0, manifest unchanged, no exception).
